Package high.mackenzie.snowflake

Snowflake Recursive-Descent Parser Library

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
IGrammarBuilder An instance of this interface constructs a new Parsing Expression Grammar.
IParser An instance of this interface is a parser based on a Parsing Expression Grammar.
ITreeNode An instance of this class is a node in a syntax-tree.
ITreeNodeVisitor An instance of this interface is a visitor that visits a node in a syntax-tree.
 

Class Summary
AbstractTreeNode An instance of this class is a node in a syntax-tree.
Grammar An instance of this class is a dynamically created Parsing Expression Grammar.
GrammarBuilder This class provides a concrete grammar builder that can build grammars for immediate usage.
LinesAndColumns An instance of this class computes line-numbers and column-numbers regarding a character-array.
Parser An instance of this class is a parser that is based on a Parsing Expression Grammar.
ParserOutput An instance of this class is the output of a parser.
Trace An instance of this class is the output of a tracer that records match-attempts.
TraceElement An instance of this class describes either the entry or exit of a match attempt.
Tracer An instance of this class facilitates the recording of a bounded number of match attempts.
TreeNode An instance of this class is a node in the parse-tree data-structure created via parsing.
Utils This class provides static utility methods.
 

Enum Summary
NewlineStyles This enumeration defines constants for various platform-dependent newlines sequences.
TraceElementReason These constants indicate the reasons why a trace-element was created.
 

Package high.mackenzie.snowflake Description

Snowflake Recursive-Descent Parser Library
